subject: Ops note: workshop deployment schedule for Vancouver | Frida Kahlo | Q1 review | INIT-7773
body: Intelligence from Vancouver indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the workshop banner. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Frida Kahlo and Alan Turing. Reference initiative INIT-7773. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: ops, coffee.
